zh.New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial Ame: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Jameson於1710年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，她的父親John Jameson Jr35歲，母親Elizabeth Jane Cox18歲。她於1732年與Benjamin Franklin Hancock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年在她的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州古倫德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Jameson于1710年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，她的父亲John Jameson Jr35岁，母亲Elizabeth Jane Cox18岁。她于1732年与Benjamin Franklin Hancock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年在她的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州古倫德。

nameMeanings.name: Jameson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Jamison  .

variants.name: Jamerson
meanings: English: variant of   Jameson  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Jimmerson
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of Jameson , based on a pet form of the personal name James.

variants.name: Jamison
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English and Scots Jami(e)son, Jameson, Jem(i)son ‘son of James’ (see James ). Jameson and Jamison are mainly found in northern England, especially in Northumberland and Durham, while in Scotland the more usual form is Jamieson , but all three versions occur on either side of the border.

variants.name: Jimerson
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Jameson  , based on a pet form of the personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Jameson was born in 1710, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, John Jameson Jr, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth Jane Cox, was 18. She married Benjamin Franklin Hancock in 1732, in New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1752, in her hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Goochland, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Jameson est née en 1710, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Jameson Jr, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jane Cox, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Franklin Hancock en 1732, à New Kent, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1752, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Goochland, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Sie hat 1732 in New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America Benjamin Franklin Hancock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Jameson(이)가 1710년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Jameson Jr(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Jane Cox(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1732년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트에서 Benjamin Franklin Hancock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 구클랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial Ame: ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Jameson родилась в 1710 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Jameson Jr было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jane Cox, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Franklin Hancock в 1732 г. в местности ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1752 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности гучланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Benjamin Franklin Hancock en 1732, en New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1752, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Goochland, Virginia, British Colonial America.
